text:
The original Professor Shabooboo presumably became a Cronenberg in the Cronenberged Dimension.

Professor Shabooboo is the leading expert in sperm and helps the President solve the monster sperm crisis. He steals Summer's idea of enlarging one of her eggs to attract the sperm to Las Vegas. However, upon realizing that the monster sperm are actually Morty's enlarged sperm, he decides to launch the egg into space but states that it takes 30 minutes to launch the egg into space. Realizing that the plan won't work, he asks Summer for help but she dismisses him by saying that it was his idea likely as her way of rubbing in that him stealing her idea horribly backfired on him. He then says that there is one solution, but jumps off the tower saying "See you all in hell!" before hitting the ground and dying not wanting to suffer any repercussions.
